programs.title: The Kitchen
programs.desc: "The Kitchen" celebrates Mother's Day; Geoffrey Zakarian's Chamomile French toast; Katie Lee's mini broccoli quiches; Bloom School is in session with three new floral arrangements; the gang plays Pass the Chicken Salad.

programs.title: The Kitchen
programs.desc: A Mother's Day lunch includes salmon en papillote with tapenade, an orzo salad, a frittata with spinach, olives and chicken sausage, and a lemon poppy seed Bundt cake with strawberry glaze.

programs.title: The Kitchen
programs.desc: Celebrating Mother's Day with recipes made with love; grilled lamb chops and vegetable skewers; crispy salmon with smashed sweet potatoes; a sweet parfait for brunch; the hosts work on a Mediterranean herb garden that doubles as a gift for Mom.

programs.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programs.sub_title: Judges Takeover Heat No. 1: Welcome to the Asphalt Jungle
programs.desc: Eric Greenspan, Antonia Lofaso and Aarti Sequeira compete.

programs.title: Supermarket Stakeout

programs.desc: Gabe Bertaccini, Damaris Phillips and Joe Sasto compete.

programs.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programs.sub_title: Judges Takeover Heat No. 3: Pick Up Your Knives
programs.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli tasks judges with selecting shoppers and ingredients for a seafood dish to reach the finale; competitors focus on meat before the top two present Maneet Chauhan and Beau MacMillan with a fruity dish.
